title: AshenOG's Economy Centered Visible Ore Borders!
description: A pack that makes all high-paying ores visible and all low-paying ores stone/deepslate
body:
A PACK TO MAKE SERVER ORE MINING MUCH MORE EFFICIENT!
![Desc Pic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6080b669f9c13ee4421ab4495e33b8a0eb93d3b0.png)

This texture pack does a few things that makes mining on economy servers much more efficient. Most economy-based servers have a miner job that pays ingame currency for ores mined. On top of this, a majority of servers pay higher job pay for rarer and more valuable ores such as gold, lapis, diamonds, and emeralds. This texture pack aims to maximize your profits while still steering clear of being a full blown xray texture pack (which most servers tend to forbid). In this pack, you can expect:


All high-paying ores (gold, lapis, diamond, and emerald) to be outlined with the traditional green outline from my previous ore borders texture pack)

All low-paying ores (coal, copper, iron, and redstone) to be replaced with either the stone or deepslate texture depending on level to blend in these ores


Tips to help with efficient use of this pack:

Make sure you download and install the pack version that works with the version of minecraft you wish to play with this pack on
If you wish to mine ores that have been hidden such as iron or coal, switch off the texture pack in the settings, or install my other texture pack, [insert pack link] to make them more visible

Pack issues I am aware of:

Hidden redstone textures for both stone and deepslate still emit the glow effect when stood on, built on, or hit by accident
The deepslate texture for hidden ores sometimes/always does not align with naturally generated deepslate

[NOTES FROM DEV: Before installing and using in an economy server, please be sure to check with your server admins to be 100% sure if this pack obeys server rules. Some servers may allow this pack, while others may not. All cases in which players are banned from servers for using my pack(s) are to be liable by the players themselves, not by me. Also, the above listed issues may or may not be resolved in future patch updates. If you would like to report additional issues with the pack, please join my discord server]
